## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Why

Explain why this change is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:pack` if packaging or runtime behavior changed
- [ ] `npm run eval:fixtures` if compile, export, or task-pack relevance changed
- [ ] `npm run release:check` if release workflow, package metadata, or release docs changed

## Docs

- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Docs not needed

## Impact

- [ ] User-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Packaging or release workflow changed
- [ ] No user-facing behavior change
